info.name: Jalan Mutu Beton Module
info.description: API collection for Jalan Mutu Beton (Road Concrete Quality) module - Master data for concrete quality/grade used in road construction

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Jalan Mutu Beton (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan mutu beton with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "jenis": "K-300",
      "createdAt": "...",
      "updatedAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "amount": 10,
  "total": 5,
  "totalPages": 1
}
```

item.name: Get All Jalan Mutu Beton (without pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan mutu beton without pagination (returns all records).

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

Get single jalan mutu beton detail by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "jenis": "K-300",
  "createdAt": "...",
  "updatedAt": "..."
}
```

item.description: Read-only endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (SUPERADMIN Only)

request.description:
Create new jalan mutu beton.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "jenis": "string" // Required - Mutu/grade beton
}
```

**Common Values** (Concrete Grades):
- "K-225" - Compressive strength ~18.75 MPa
- "K-250" - Compressive strength ~20.83 MPa
- "K-275" - Compressive strength ~22.92 MPa
- "K-300" - Compressive strength ~25.00 MPa
- "K-350" - Compressive strength ~29.17 MPa
- "K-400" - Compressive strength ~33.33 MPa
- "K-450" - Compressive strength ~37.50 MPa
- "K-500" - Compressive strength ~41.67 MPa

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Jalan Mutu Beton created",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis": "K-300",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Create K-350 concrete grade (high strength for heavy traffic).

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create K-400 concrete grade (very high strength for industrial roads).

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Update existing jalan mutu beton.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,      // Required - ID to update
  "jenis": string    // Optional - New mutu beton name
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Mutu Beton updated",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis": "K-300 (Updated)",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Soft delete jalan mutu beton.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number  // Required - ID to delete
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Mutu Beton deleted",
  "data": true
}
```

**Note**: This is a soft delete. The record will be marked as deleted but not removed from database.

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Only accessible by SUPERADMIN
